_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in verifying participation in a security awareness program
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Skill SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.494), RC-S-009 (RC, cosine: 0.461).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.516). Shared vocabulary: [security, skill]. NICE-only terms [awareness, participation, program, verifying] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.905, R=0.864). P exceeds R by 0.041 — the NICE element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.1%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in verifying participation in a security awareness program" and "Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, inclu". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.534 ≈ STS 0.516 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [security, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [security, skill]. NICE-only: [awareness, participation, program, verifying]. WIDAI-only: [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data].
